cast.name: 亚历山大·勒布朗 Alexandre Leblanc

introduction: In this tale, halfway between reality and fantasy, a mysterious narrator tells us the story of Amani, a young boy passionate about dance. Amani's innocence and joie de vivre open the narrator's eyes to the humanity he had never really cared about before. But as the night begins to rumble, Amani's joie de vivre disappears to give way to his pain, which echoes in the silence of the plain.
